meta.name: English
meta.author: Ximo & AI
welcome.system_active: The system is operational. Visual effects are safely managed by HVE.
welcome.system_inactive: System halted. Requires acceptance of the persistence contract to continue.
welcome.warning.title: SECURE PERSISTENCE CONTRACT
welcome.warning.text: Upon activation, HVE will deploy a guardian shield and inject a secure path into your hyprland.conf. If you uninstall the plugin from the Shell, the system will self-clean on the next reboot without causing Hyprland errors.
welcome.features.title: Features & Benefits
welcome.features.description: Hyprland Visual Editor is the aesthetic evolution of your desktop.
welcome.docs.title: Architecture & Documentation
welcome.docs.description: Discover how HVE works under the hood.
welcome.docs.summary: Hyprland Visual Editor uses a real-time Fragments and Assembly system. It never touches your main configuration. Everything is safely generated in an isolated overlay.conf master file.
welcome.credits.title: Credits
welcome.credits.ai_desc: QML Architecture and path debugging assistance by Gemini (Google).
animations.header_subtitle: Select the animation style for your desktop
animations.presets.01_relampago.title: Lightning
animations.presets.02_inercia_elastica.d: Organic movement. Windows gain momentum on exit and bounce on entry.
animations.presets.03_seda_minimalista.d: Absolute smoothness. No bounces, just perfect macOS-style landings.
animations.presets.04_minimalismo_snappy: Optimized for maximum speed. Window and workspace management only.
animations.presets.05_material_moderno.d: Google Pixel aesthetic. Organic animations, subtle scaling, and tactile response.
animations.presets.06_impacto_clasico.de: "Jelly" effect. Elastic bounce on entry and anticipation on exit.
animations.presets.07_lineal.title: Linear
animations.presets.07_lineal.desc: Mathematical precision. Constant motion, "Sci-Fi HUD" style.
animations.presets.08_cristal.title: Glass
animations.presets.08_cristal.desc: Ethereal glide. Feeling of glass floating without friction.
animations.presets.09_seda_silk.title: Silk
animations.presets.09_seda_silk.desc: Refined JaKooLit style. Energetic entries, fleeting exits, and stable workspaces.
animations.presets.10_retro_arcade.title: Retro Arcade
animations.presets.10_retro_arcade.desc: "Toon/Arcade" effect. Windows jump and bounce exaggeratedly.
animations.presets.11_futurista.title: Futuristic
animations.presets.11_futurista.desc: Holographic interface. Digital precision, zero bounces, and vertical data flow.
animations.presets.12_rebote.title: Bounce
animations.presets.12_rebote.desc: Vertical spring physics. Windows fall and bounce upon opening.
animations.presets.13_organico.title: Organic
animations.presets.13_organico.desc: "Sprout" movement. Smooth vertical growth and slow fades.
animations.presets.14_elastico.title: Elastic
animations.presets.14_elastico.desc: Rubber band physics. Windows arrive, stretch, and bounce vertically.
animations.presets.15_desvanecido.title: Fade
animations.presets.15_desvanecido.desc: Spectral materialization. Windows appear smoothly with barely any movement.
animations.presets.16_dinamico.title: Dynamic
animations.presets.16_dinamico.desc: Organic rhythm. Combination of speed and smooth settling.
animations.presets.17_sutil.title: Subtle
animations.presets.17_sutil.desc: Zero distractions. Absolute smoothness without bounces or abrupt movements.
animations.presets.18_energico.title: Energetic
animations.presets.18_energico.desc: Maximum visual impact. Exaggerated bounces (56%) and kickback exits.
borders.geometry.title: Border Thickness

borders.presets.08_neon.title: Neon Breath
borders.presets.09_glitch.title: Cyber Glitch
borders.presets.10_golden.title: Golden Luxury
borders.presets.11_toxic.title: Toxic Green
borders.presets.12_neon_cyberpunk.title: Neon Cyber-Glow (Dual)
borders.presets.12_neon_cyberpunk.desc: Simulation of bicolor brightness using a white/violet light base.
borders.presets.13_the_joker.title: The Joker
borders.presets.13_the_joker.desc: Joker aesthetic: Acid green and deep purple with an electric glow.
